title: Cuneiform Tablet #0604: Neo-Assyrian Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
